name: tui-snapshot-parity
description: TUI/snapshot parity pattern: TimingPanel shows same fields as snapshot TIMING section. Fields to keep in sync: prompt (snapshot->TUI), last_thought (TUI->snapshot), step detail section (TUI->snapshot via STEP DETAIL block). Each new state field in WorkflowState must be added to both renderers.
snapshot.py step_history loss: update_state_file double-escapes JSON quotes; json.loads fails on readback, history resets to [] each step
resolution: Add _parse_step_history() in snapshot.py with unescape fallback: try raw.replace('\"', '"') if initial parse fails

content: last_thought display: suppress bare tool names (no spaces, no colon) — prism_activity_hook writes tool_name alone when no context; meaningful thoughts always have spaces or 'tool: context' format

step_history YAML frontmatter: parse_state_file uses split(':',1) so a one-line JSON array value (e.g. [{"i":0,"s":2,"tc":10}]) parses correctly — inner JSON colons are preserved in the value after the first split

name: plugin-version-display
description: Read version from .claude-plugin/plugin.json relative to tool: Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent.parent / '.claude-plugin' / 'plugin.json'. Store as module-level _PLUGIN_VERSION string. Display as 'v{version}' in TUI format_title and snapshot header. Fallback to empty string on any Exception — no crash.

name: cli-version-header
description: TUI and snapshot headers show PRISM version from .claude-plugin/plugin.json via _read_plugin_version() helper. Module-level _PLUGIN_VERSION constant with graceful fallback to empty string.

name: claude-plugin-root-version-resolution
description: CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT preferred pattern: _read_plugin_version() checks os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT') first; if set, resolves plugin.json as Path(root)/'.claude-plugin'/'plugin.json'; falls back to Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent.parent pattern when unset. Applied in both app.py and snapshot.py.

name: plugin-root-version-resolution
description: _read_plugin_version() prefers CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT env var for plugin.json resolution, falls back to __file__-relative. Shows the version of the actually-loaded plugin (cache or source), critical for detecting stale cache.

content: Version bump pattern: update plugin.json version field AND update test_release_docs.py AC-4 assertion (method name, docstring, and assert value) to match. Other AC sections (1-3, 5-6) test CHANGELOG content and do not need updating for patch bumps.
Every code change to prism-devtools requires at least a 0.0.1 version bump in plugin.json and corresponding test assertion update in test_release_docs.py.

name: workflow-table-bar-columns
description: Workflow table uses proportional ASCII bars (DurBar, TokBar) instead of percentage columns. _fmt_bar(value, total, width=6) returns '#'-filled, '-'-empty string. Total is computed from step_history + current live values. Phase and Type columns removed for cleaner layout.

content: DurBar/TokBar columns use Unicode block chars: '█' for filled and '░' for empty (replaces '#'/'-' ASCII). Style matches the story panel green progress bar.

snapshot activity-feed: _render_activity_feed() parses session transcript JSONL for tool_use content items; extracts timestamp, tool name, args (first 2 keys, 30-char truncation). Replaces TIMING section in snapshot output to show live tool call log.

name: activity-feed-widget
description: ActivityFeed widget: reads transcript JSONL incrementally (same pattern as _read_live_tokens), extracts tool_use from top-level type=tool_use and assistant message.content[] array, keeps last 20 entries in deque, renders via update_state(WorkflowState) interface matching all other dashboard widgets.

content: DurBar/TokBar use agent-specific Rich colors: SM=blue, QA=red, DEV=green, gate=dim. _agent_bar_color() maps agent→color. Width increased from 6 to 10 for better proportional resolution.

name: bar-scaling-gate-exclusion
description: When computing total_dur/total_toks for DurBar/TokBar proportional bars, exclude current step if gate (step_type=='gate') or stale. Gate steps accumulate hours while paused, dominating the total and making completed steps round to 0 blocks. Show empty bars for the gate row itself since gate duration is not meaningful work time.

name: storypanel-full-width-layout
description: TUI layout change: StoryPanel moved from left-col Vertical to full-width row directly in body Container, between GatePanel and details Horizontal. CSS entry added with height:auto margin-bottom:1 at top level.

content: snapshot-section-order: render_snapshot() order matches TUI layout: WORKFLOW > Gate Alert > STORY > ACTIVITY FEED > STEP DETAIL

name: storypanel-left-col-layout
description: StoryPanel moved from full-width row into #left-col Vertical after StepDetail. ActivityFeed in #right-col gets '#right-col ActivityFeed { height: 1fr }' scoped CSS rule to fill full column height.

content: GatePanel moved from full-width body row into #left-col Vertical (stacked above StepDetail and StoryPanel). Right-col remains ActivityFeed full-height. compose() order: AgentRoster, WorkflowTable, Horizontal#details(left-col[GatePanel,StepDetail,StoryPanel], right-col[ActivityFeed]).

name: gate-panel-full-width-layout
description: GatePanel layout: full-width before Horizontal(#details). GatePanel belongs outside left-col Vertical — yield GatePanel() directly under Container(#body) before the Horizontal(#details) block. In styles.tcss GatePanel gets margin-bottom:1 for spacing.

content: Phase column in WorkflowTable/snapshot: _fmt_phase() maps Planning=blue, TDD RED=red, TDD GREEN=green; completed steps use dim=True; snapshot.py uses plain f-string padding step.phase:<12; TUI/snapshot parity requires both files updated together
GatePanel is inside #left-col Vertical (first child, before StepDetail and StoryPanel). Right-col retains ActivityFeed full-height. #left-col has overflow-y:auto. Introduced in 2.6.3.

description: brain_engine._normalize() story_completeness: PSP_WEIGHTS for ('sm','draft_story') uses story_completeness=0.3, but _normalize() only divided by 100 for coverage_pct/traceability_pct/probe_accuracy — story_completeness fell through to raw value (e.g. 85.0 instead of 0.85), corrupting SM PSP scores.
resolution: Add 'story_completeness' to the percentage-metrics tuple in _normalize(). Pattern: whenever a new pct metric is added to PSP_WEIGHTS, also add it to _normalize()'s division-by-100 branch.

content: Version bump pattern: bump plugin.json AND update test_release_docs.py AC-4 assertion together; both must agree for tests to pass

description: version bump in plugin.json breaks test_ac4_plugin_json_version_is_260 which hardcodes expected version
resolution: If test_release_docs.py is not in FILE_SCOPE, revert version bump and note it in result mail

name: brain-status-tui
description: _brain_status(work_dir) in app.py: queries .prism/brain/brain.db (table 'documents') and graph.db (table 'entities') via stdlib sqlite3; returns (-1,-1) when absent; displayed in format_title() after cache section; polled every 10 ticks via _brain_check_tick

name: brain-engine-cli-entrypoint
description: brain_engine.py __main__ block handles init/ingest/search/status commands via sys.argv; _cli_source_dirs() mirrors brain_bootstrap logic; no-args exits code 1 with usage; SKILL.md execute blocks use python3 CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/brain_engine.py.

brain_status() in app.py queried 'SELECT COUNT(*) FROM documents' but Brain schema table is 'docs'; query silently failed (bare except), returned -1, showed 'BRAIN OFF' in header even when Brain was fully initialized.
resolution: Change 'documents' to 'docs' in the SELECT COUNT(*) query.

description: gate-step-systemMessage-blocks: Gate steps (red_gate, green_gate) used {systemMessage: ...} output which does NOT block Claude from continuing
resolution: Change gate output to {decision: block, reason: ...} format — same as agent steps. Fix at prism_stop_hook.py lines 970-972.

name: brain-active-header-indicator
description: format_title() checks step_history_parsed for any entry with bq>0; shows 'BRAIN ACTIVE' in bright_green vs 'BRAIN Nd/Me' in green when indexed-but-unused.

content: WorkflowTable adds Brain column: dim-green ● when bq>0, dim · when 0, dim live for current step, empty for pending. bq field read from step_history entries.

name: brain-feed-icon
description: activity_feed.py _fmt_line() and snapshot.py _render_activity_feed() detect brain calls by: 'brain' in name.lower() OR (name=='Skill' AND 'brain' in str(inp).lower()); label becomes emoji BRAIN in TUI and ASCII output.

name: completion-metrics-approve-pattern
description: prism_approve.py green_gate block reads step_history via regex from raw state file (JSON array), computes per-step duration/tokens/tok-per-min/bq/skills, prints ASCII table, appends ## Workflow Metrics markdown table to story file before cleanup().

name: workflow-completion-metrics
description: prism_approve.py: at green_gate completion, reads step_history from state file, computes per-step metrics (duration, tokens, tok/min, brain queries, skills), prints formatted summary table to stdout, and appends ## Workflow Metrics markdown section to story file before cleanup() deletes state.

name: green-count-gate-override
description: _count_green_tests() green_gate override: when current_step_index >= 7 in state file, return (total, total) to bypass stale lastfailed from RED phase — regex check on state file avoids circular dependency with parse_state_file()

name: snapshot-timing-section
description: render_snapshot() TIMING section (after gate alert, before STORY) shows Started, Last Act, Elapsed, Last Thought (filtered: must have space or colon), Branch, Session (truncated 8 chars; ERROR if empty), Model.

name: cancel-approve-cleanup-pattern
description: cancel/approve cleanup: set active:false + paused_for_manual:false in state file instead of STATE_FILE.unlink() — preserves file for TUI/CLI final state display

name: gate-loop-back-to-targets
description: red_gate loop_back_to=3 (write_failing_tests), green_gate loop_back_to=5 (implement_tasks) — correct reject targets for gate steps across prism_stop_hook.py, prism_reject.py, prism_approve.py

content: Obsidian/context-memory legacy code deleted in Phase 5.1. Deleted: 5 hook files, initialize-project-memory skill, smart-connections.md. Cleaned references from docker-compose.yml, .env.example, .gitignore, core-config.yaml (memory: and smart_connections: sections). CHANGELOG.md retained as historical record (excluded from grep check).

name: brain-analytics-command
description: brain_engine.py CLI handles 'analytics' command: reads outcomes.jsonl, reports variant effectiveness, per-step pass rates, token trends.

name: dotnet-sln-path-resolution
description: detect_test_runner dotnet path resolution: walks parent dirs from .csproj to find .sln file, passes quoted path to dotnet test and dotnet format. Fixes MSB1003 when CWD lacks .sln.

content: Version bump pattern MUST include marketplace.json: when bumping plugin.json version, ALWAYS also update .claude-plugin/marketplace.json top-level version AND plugin entry version to match. Claude Code uses plugin.json version for cache resolution but stale marketplace.json causes confusion and update detection issues.

name: windows-path-mangle-fix
description: _project_transcript_dir() Windows path bug: str(cwd).replace('/', '-') fails on Windows where paths use backslash. Fix: normalise with str(cwd).replace('\\', '/') first, then replace '/' with '-'. Ensures C:\foo\bar mangles correctly on all platforms.

name: gate-passed-feedback-fix
description: gate_passed feedback fix: prism_stop_hook.py must compute step metrics (duration, tokens) BEFORE the validate_step() check so they're available for record_outcome() on both pass and fail paths. When validation fails, call Conductor.record_outcome(gate_passed=0) before the block decision — otherwise Conductor never learns which prompts fail.

name: cherry-pick-branch-divergence-resolution
description: When cherry-picking commits from a branch that diverged before a recent main fix: the full branch diff vs main may show deletions that aren't real removals — they simply weren't on the older branch. Cherry-picking onto the latest main preserves all new main changes correctly.

content: SFR snapshot section: _read_sfr_stats() queries .prism/brain/scores.db subagent_outcomes table; groups by '/sfr' in prompt_id; renders SFR PERFORMANCE section in render_snapshot() showing runs, cert avg, blocks avg, gate agree pct, timeouts. Section placed after STORY panel.

SFR TUI header indicator: _sfr_status(work_dir) module-level function queries scores.db; polled every 10 ticks in _poll_state(); shown in format_title() as '●SFR Nr cert:X.X/6' (magenta) or '○SFR 0' (dim). Only shown when total_runs >= 0.

name: scores-db-unique-pk
description: subagent_outcomes PRIMARY KEY is (prompt_id, validator, timestamp). Test helper _make_scores_db must supply explicit unique timestamps to avoid IntegrityError when inserting multiple rows with same prompt_id+validator.

name: sfr-snapshot-section
description: snapshot.py _read_sfr_stats() reads scores.db subagent_outcomes, groups by /sfr in prompt_id (SFR vs freeform), renders SFR PERFORMANCE section with runs, cert avg, blocks avg, gate agreement %, timeouts. Section placed after STORY, before ACTIVITY FEED.

name: sfr-tui-header-indicator
description: app.py _sfr_status() reads scores.db subagent_outcomes, returns (total, sfr_runs, cert_avg). TUI header shows magenta SFR indicator (Xr cert:Y.Z/6) when total>0, dim SFR 0 when empty, hidden when db absent. Polled every 10 ticks via _sfr_check_tick.

content: review_previous_notes token budget: hard cap 3 files max, explicit DO NOT for codebase exploration, Path A (handoff) skips all file reads, Path B reads at most 1-2 stories + 1 brain query. Step 3-4 (grep dev notes, identify patterns) removed entirely.

Version bump pattern: plugin.json at plugins/prism-devtools/.claude-plugin/plugin.json (NOT plugins/prism-devtools/plugin.json); marketplace.json has no version field to update; test_release_docs.py has two version assertions (AC-4 and AC-5 test_ac5_250_is_latest_version) that both must be updated; CHANGELOG.md needs new section with summary of changes

name: stop-hook-session-leniency
description: is_same_session() returns True when current_session_id is empty (hook input missing session_id), falling through to staleness check for protection instead of rejecting. Prevents permanent workflow stuck state.

name: stop-hook-unconditional-last-activity
description: last_activity must be updated unconditionally after staleness check passes (not just on branch change or token receipt). Prevents the 2-hour staleness trap when stops have no tokens/model/branch change.

name: stop-hook-fallback-instruction-resilience
description: build_agent_instruction() in Conductor fallback path must be wrapped in try/except. On failure emit 'Proceed with step: <id>' minimal instruction rather than letting exception propagate silently.

content: Version bump pattern MUST include marketplace.json: when bumping plugin.json version, ALWAYS also update marketplace.json at plugins/prism-devtools/.claude-plugin/marketplace.json. marketplace.json tracks plugin version in plugins[0].version field.
WorkflowTable and snapshot 'Brain' column: column header for brain_queries (bq) is 'Brain' (not 'Mem') in both workflow_table.py add_columns() and snapshot.py header format string.

Conductor.select_relevant_skills: use isinstance(dict) guard when calling mock-able Brain methods to prevent MagicMock from leaking into sort operations. get_skill_scores_for_step returns per-step dict; fallback to get_skill_scores when empty.

token-count-fix: total_tokens = input_tokens + output_tokens only; cache_creation_input_tokens and cache_read_input_tokens must NOT be added to totals. Cache read tokens are served from cache (90% discount) and re-counted every turn, inflating counts massively. 4 locations: get_usage_from_transcript(), get_session_metrics_from_transcript(), app._read_live_tokens(), snapshot._load_token_state().
